description: CompositionGreen printed kurta made of 100% cotton, with a V-neck that has a purple piping and thread detailing that extends to the chest placket, floral and printed purple panel on the shoulder region, with short sleeves and split side hemsFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachDry in shadeHot iron inside outEthnic is back with a bang in the form of this printed kurta from w! Look ethnically hip in this green and purple print kurta, while the pure cotton fabric keeps you absolutely fresh and comfortable through the day.
